briefing: Markets were mildly negative today (NASDAQ -0.8%, S&P 500 -0.2%), a neutral-to-soft session rather than a clear risk-on or risk-off signal. Existing positions were held since none hit stop-loss or profit-target levels, and one new position was added in TMDX, which showed complete multi-signal confirmation despite the broader market softness.

daily_lesson.explanation_en: Multi-signal confirmation means only acting on a trade when several independent technical indicators — like a MACD crossover, RSI in a healthy range, price above its moving average, and a volume surge — all line up together. Relying on just one signal can be misleading, but when four or five agree, it suggests real institutional buying interest rather than random noise.
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: 多重信號確認是指只有當多個獨立技術指標（例如MACD黃金交叉、RSI處於健康區間、股價高於均線、以及成交量放大）同時出現時才進行交易。單一信號容易造成誤判，但當四、五個信號同時符合時，通常代表有真實的機構資金進場，而非隨機波動。

market_education.summary_en: Major indices drifted slightly lower today, with the NASDAQ underperforming the S&P 500, consistent with a quiet, directionless trading session rather than any major catalyst-driven move. Broad breadth was mixed, with select stocks like TMDX, STLA, and PFE bucking the trend on strong volume and momentum signals. Without a clear macro driver, the modest pullback looks like routine consolidation after recent gains rather than the start of a deeper correction.
market_education.summary_zh: 今日主要指數溫和走低，納斯達克表現遜於標普500指數，屬於缺乏明確催化劑的清淡交易日。市場廣度好壞參半，但TMDX、STLA、PFE等個股憑藉強勁成交量及動能信號逆勢走強。在沒有明顯宏觀因素帶動下，今日小幅回檔較像是近期漲勢後的常規整理，而非深度回調的開端。

trades.reasoning: Full institutional-grade signal confirmation (MACD bullish crossover, rising histogram, RSI 69.3 in bullish zone, price above SMA-20, volume surge) on the top-scored candidate.
